common.title: Title
common.spotifyUnavailable: Spotify is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
common.openInSpotifyFailed: Could not open in Spotify. Please try again.

errors.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors.pageErrorDesc: This page encountered an error. Don't worry, the rest of the app is still working.

home.title: Your Library
home.emptyDescription: Search for artists or albums to start building your collection.

clearModal.title: Clear completed playlists?
clearModal.description: This will remove all completed playlists from your library. Downloaded files will NOT be deleted.

library.title: Library
library.emptyDescription: Scan or rescan your downloads folder to populate your library and artwork.

album.notFoundDescription: Could not find this album in your library.
album.emptyTracks: No tracks found for this album.
album.playbackBlocked: Your browser blocked playback. Try pressing play again or checking autoplay permissions.
album.playbackFailed: Playback failed for this track. Try again.
album.playbackUnavailable: This track could not be loaded for playback. The source may be unavailable or unsupported.
album.playbackUnsupported: Playback is not supported for this track format in your browser.

scanModal.title: Scan library
scanModal.description: Choose whether to only scan your library or also start artwork backfill.
scanModal.startBackfill: Start artwork backfill after scan starts successfully
scanModal.backfillActive: Artwork backfill is already running. You can still run scan-only.
scanModal.scanAndBackfillStarted: Library scan and artwork backfill started.
scanModal.backfillAlreadyRunning: Library scan started. Artwork backfill is already running.
scanModal.partialFailure: Library scan started, but artwork backfill could not be started.

releases.title: Releases
releases.emptyDescription: No recent releases found from your followed artists.

myPlaylists.title: My Spotify Playlists
myPlaylists.error: Failed to load your playlists from Spotify.

errors.createFailed: Failed to create playlist. Please try again.
errors.retryFailedTracks: Failed to retry tracks. Please try again.

playlist.emptyTracksTitle: No tracks in this playlist yet
playlist.emptyTracksDescription: Tracks you download or sync will appear here.
playlist.noPlayableTracks: Download tracks in this playlist to start local playback.

deleteModal.title: Delete {{name}}?
deleteModal.description: This will remove the playlist from your library. Downloaded files will NOT be deleted.

artist.rateLimited: Discography temporarily unavailable. Spotify is rate limiting requests — try again in a few minutes.

discography.title: Discography
discography.emptyFiltered: No releases found for this category.

albums.noTracks: No tracks available for this album.

auth.title: Spotify Authentication
auth.connectedDescription: You're connected to Spotify. This allows access to your playlists and Spotify-created playlists.
auth.disconnectedDescription: Connect your Spotify account to access your personal playlists and Spotify-created playlists (like 'Made For You').

benefits.personal: Import your personal and collaborative playlists
benefits.sync: Sync your followed artists for new releases

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Select your preferred language for the interface.

AI_PROVIDER.label: AI Provider
AI_PROVIDER.description: The AI provider to use for playlist generation.

AI_BASE_URL.label: AI Base URL
AI_BASE_URL.description: Optional override for the provider's default endpoint. Required only for the 'custom' provider.

AI_API_KEY.label: AI API Key
AI_API_KEY.description: The API key for the AI provider. Stored securely and masked on read.

AI_MODEL.label: AI Model
AI_MODEL.description: The model name to use for playlist generation (e.g. gpt-4o, llama-3.1).
AI_MODEL.modelsEmpty: No models returned. Type a model name manually.
AI_MODEL.modelsError: Could not load models. Check your provider settings.

UI_LANGUAGE.label: Interface Language
UI_LANGUAGE.description: Select your preferred language for the interface.

SPOTIFY_MARKET.label: Spotify Market/Region
SPOTIFY_MARKET.description: 2-letter ISO country code that affects content availability and regional restrictions. Change this to match your location for better results.

AUTO_SUBSCRIBE_NEW_PLAYLISTS.label: Automatically subscribe to new playlists
AUTO_SUBSCRIBE_NEW_PLAYLISTS.description: When enabled, new playlists are automatically subscribed. If disabled, you'll need to manually subscribe to them.

PLAYLIST_CHECK_INTERVAL_MINUTES.label: Playlist check interval (minutes)
PLAYLIST_CHECK_INTERVAL_MINUTES.description: How often SpotiArr should re-check subscribed playlists on Spotify for new tracks. Lower values increase API usage.

M3U_GENERATION_ENABLED.label: Automatically generate M3U playlists
M3U_GENERATION_ENABLED.description: When enabled, an M3U file will be created/updated for each completed playlist.

RELEASES_LOOKBACK_DAYS.label: New releases lookback period (days)
RELEASES_LOOKBACK_DAYS.description: How far back to look for new releases.

FOLLOWED_ARTISTS_MAX.label: Maximum followed artists
FOLLOWED_ARTISTS_MAX.description: Maximum number of followed artists to consider across releases and artists views. Higher values may slow down the releases feed and increase API usage.

RELEASES_CACHE_MINUTES.label: Cache duration (minutes)
RELEASES_CACHE_MINUTES.description: How long to cache releases data before refreshing from Spotify. Lower values increase API usage.

FORMAT.label: Audio format
FORMAT.description: The audio format for downloaded tracks.

YT_AUDIO_QUALITY.label: YouTube audio quality
YT_AUDIO_QUALITY.description: Audio quality preference for YouTube downloads. 'best' for highest quality, 'good' for balanced, 'acceptable' for faster downloads.

YT_COOKIES.label: YouTube Cookies
YT_COOKIES.description: Paste the content of your cookies.txt (Netscape format). It will be saved as a file.

YT_SEARCH_CONCURRENCY.label: YouTube search concurrency
YT_SEARCH_CONCURRENCY.description: Number of simultaneous YouTube searches. Higher values are faster but may trigger rate limits.

YT_DOWNLOADS_PER_MINUTE.label: YouTube downloads per minute
YT_DOWNLOADS_PER_MINUTE.description: Maximum number of downloads that can start per minute to avoid YouTube throttling.

DOWNLOAD_MAX_RETRIES.label: Maximum download retries
DOWNLOAD_MAX_RETRIES.description: How many times to retry a failed download before giving up.

SEARCH_MAX_ATTEMPTS.label: Maximum search attempts
SEARCH_MAX_ATTEMPTS.description: How many times to retry finding a track on YouTube before marking it permanently failed.

RECOVERY_JOB_INTERVAL_MINUTES.label: Error recovery interval (minutes)
RECOVERY_JOB_INTERVAL_MINUTES.description: How often to re-drive errored tracks across all playlists.

STUCK_TRACKS_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MINUTES.label: Stuck tracks cleanup interval (minutes)
STUCK_TRACKS_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MINUTES.description: How often to check for and clean up stuck tracks.

STUCK_TRACKS_TIMEOUT_MINUTES.label: Stuck tracks timeout (minutes)
STUCK_TRACKS_TIMEOUT_MINUTES.description: How long before a track is considered stuck and eligible for cleanup.

search.title: Search
search.emptyState: Type something in the search bar to find tracks, albums, or artists

instanceAuth.title: Instance Protected
instanceAuth.description: This SpotiArr instance is password-protected. Enter the access token to continue.
instanceAuth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment before trying again.
instanceAuth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please enter the token again.
instanceAuth.connectionErrorMessage: Could not reach the SpotiArr server. Check that it is running and try again.

aiChat.emptyState: No conversation yet. Ask me to generate a playlist.
aiChat.clearConfirm: This will permanently delete your chat history.

ai.title: AI Chat
ai.subtitle: Describe a playlist in your own words and AI will find and download the tracks.

empty.title: Create a playlist with AI
empty.hint: Describe a mood, genre, activity or era — for example "upbeat 90s rock for running".

ai.promptPlaceholder: Describe the playlist you want... (e.g. "jazz for a rainy afternoon")

errors.provider-misconfig: AI provider is not configured. Please go to Settings > AI to add your credentials.
errors.provider-unreachable: Could not reach the AI provider. Please check your URL and API key, then retry.
errors.provider-auth: Authentication failed. Check your API key in Settings > AI.
errors.provider-forbidden: Access denied by the AI provider: {{detail}}
errors.llm-bad-output: The AI returned an unexpected response. Try rephrasing your prompt.
errors.zero-resolved: None of the suggested tracks could be found on Spotify. Try rephrasing your prompt.
